data.title: Ex-Shark Tank Founder and Thiel Fellow Raises $7M led by True Ventures for Tenkara to Build Ops Agents for US Manufacturers
data.description: Tenkara, a company known for constructing factories from the ground up over the past ten years, has recently secured a significant investment to facilitate their growth and enlarge the Tenkara team. The company, based in San Francisco, disclosed on March 30, 2026, that they have successfully raised $7 million in funding. This financial boost was spearheaded by a yet-to-be-named leading investment firm.

data.title: HF Sinclair Corporation First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Webcast
data.description: DALLAS--HF Sinclair Corporation (NYSE: DINO) is set to release its quarterly results for the period ending March 31, 2026, on May 1, 2026, prior to the NYSE and NYSE Texas trading sessions. A webcast conference is scheduled for the same day, starting at 8:30 a.m. Eastern time, to delve into the financial outcomes. Interested parties can access the webcast at https://events.q4inc.com/attendee/126280302. An audio recording of the webcast will also be available for playback.

data.title: Centerra Gold Announces Executive Changes
data.description: In a recent press release, Centerra Gold Inc. revealed that David Hendriks, the Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, will be departing from the company. Hendriks, who has played a significant role in the organization, will continue to assist in a consulting role to ensure a seamless handover. In his absence, Mike Sylvestre will be stepping in as the interim COO, starting from the current day. Centerra Gold Inc., listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: CG) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: CGAU), shared this update with the public on March 30, 2026.

data.title: SNDL Announces Leadership Transition for Cannabis Segment
data.description: In Edmonton, Alberta, on March 30, 2026, SNDL Inc. revealed that Tyler Robson, the President of Cannabis, has departed from the company to explore different ventures. Ryan Hellard, the current Chief Strategy Officer at SNDL, will step in as the Interim President of Cannabis. SNDL expressed well wishes for Mr. Robson in his future pursuits. SNDL Inc. operates under the tickers NASDAQ: SNDL and CSE: SNDL.

data.title: AIxCrypto Highlights Full Year 2025 Transformation and Next Phase of Growth
data.description: In Los Angeles on March 30, 2026, AIxCrypto Inc. (NASDAQ: AIXC), a tech company specializing in infrastructure for the emerging Embodied AI ("EAI") ecosystem, shared important insights from its full year 2025 results. The company emphasized significant details from the report, such as revenue growth of X%, a Y% increase in user base, and a Z% expansion in market share.AIxCrypto Inc., commonly known as AIxC, continues to make strides in the technological landscape, with a strong focus on EAI development. The company's recent financial performance showcases its dedication to innovation and growth within the industry.

data.title: Glucotrack Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Recent Corporate Highlights
data.description: A corporation is gearing up to submit an Investigational Device Exemption (IDE) for its innovative Continuous Blood Glucose Monitoring (CBGM) Technology. The company plans to initiate clinical trials in the United States in the latter part of 2026.

data.title: Falcon’s Beyond Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, Falcon’s Beyond Global, Inc. (Nasdaq: FBYD) announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending December 31, 2025. The visionary entertainment and technology company, operating through divisions like Falcon’s Creative Group, Falcon’s Beyond Destinations, and Falcon’s Beyond Brands, disclosed its revenue for the fourth quarter of 2025.

data.title: Spire Global Successfully Launches Ten Satellites on SpaceX’s Transporter-16 Mission
data.description: Spire Global, Inc. (NYSE: SPIR), a leading space-based data, analytics, and intelligence provider, recently deployed ten satellites on SpaceX's Transporter‑16 mission, with integration support from Germany's Exolaunch. One of the satellites is specifically designed to contribute to Spire's involvement in the MagQuest challenge, led by NGA, aimed at enhancing Earth's magnetic field measurement. This successful satellite launch marks another milestone for Spire in expanding its satellite network for data collection and analysis.

data.title: Canada's Stocks Are Clobbering S&P 500
data.description: So far this year, the S&P/TSX index has seen a rise of approximately 1%. Canadian stocks have outperformed the S&P 500, according to the latest reports.

data.title: Boston Scientific Just Took A 9% Header. Why Analysts Are Still Bullish.
data.description: On Monday, Boston Scientific experienced a sharp decline in its stock value following the release of inconclusive test results regarding its Watchman device used in patients susceptible to strokes. The stock plummeted by 9%, causing concerns among investors. However, despite this setback, analysts remain optimistic about the company's future prospects. This uncertain outcome has raised questions about the device's efficacy and its potential impact on Boston Scientific's market performance.

data.title: purelyIV Launches Lab Testing Services in Metro Detroit
data.description: purelyIV, a concierge mobile IV therapy provider based in Rochester Hills, Michigan, has recently unveiled new lab testing services on March 30, 2026. The company aims to offer more personalized and data-driven wellness and IV therapy care to its clients in Metro Detroit. This move is expected to enhance the quality of service provided by purelyIV, allowing them to better cater to individual needs with the support of comprehensive lab testing.

data.title: Purple Wave Auctioning Restored 1968 John Deere 4020 Tractor For Local FFA Chapter
data.description: Alva, Oklahoma is enhancing agricultural education within its classrooms. Purple Wave Auction recently announced its support for the Alva FFA chapter by assisting with their restoration project of a 1968 John Deere 4020 tractor. The auction for the restored tractor is scheduled for April 15. Additionally, Purple Wave Auction is generously donating 100% of the proceeds from the auction towards the FFA chapter's initiatives. This initiative showcases the community's dedication to advancing agricultural education and providing students with hands-on learning experiences.

data.title: Artelo Biosciences Announces Closing of $11.0 Million Private Placement Priced At-the-Market Under Nasdaq Rules
data.description: Today in Solana Beach, California, Artelo Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: ARTL) has completed a private placement offering. This involved the sale of 3,188,407 shares of common stock (or pre-funded warrants) and warrants allowing the purchase of 6,376,814 additional shares of common stock. The combined price per share/warrant was set at $3.45.

data.title: US merchants able to accept Bitcoin payments at POS, set to roll out over the next month; payments will be settled in USD.
data.description: In the upcoming month, a Block executive announced that Bitcoin payments at the point of sale will be activated automatically. Transactions will be settled in US dollars by default, with the implementation gradually taking place.
